commits: a0e62247 test(0.8.3/Slice 10): RED — persistent resumable corpus-keyed Mem0 ingest
21123933 feat(0.8.3/Slice 10): persistent + resumable Mem0 corpus ingest (corpus-keyed chroma + doc-id sidecar)
change_summary: Made the Mem0-OSS corpus ingest OPT-IN persistent + resumable + reusable so the ~78-min full-corpus ingest happens ONCE, survives a process restart, and is reused across S10/S20/S30. (1) build_local_mem0_config gained persist:bool=False; persist=True keys the chroma path/collection AND _user_id by corpus_hash ALONE (no run_id) and returns _persist/_chroma_path; persist=True without a corpus_hash raises ValueError; persist=False is byte-unchanged (codex Slice-5 [P1#2] per-run isolation preserved). (2) Mem0OSSAdapter gained chroma_path/persist ctor params + try_build_persistent(corpus_hash) (same footprint-safe local backend as try_build but corpus-keyed, user_id matches the config namespace). ingest() in persist mode maintains an atomic <chroma_path>.ingested.json sidecar: skips already-ingested doc_ids, adds only new ones, flushes the sidecar after each add (kill-mid-ingest resumes). Non-persist ingest unchanged (no sidecar, adds all). (3) build_live_adapters gained corpus_hash + mem0_persist params routing the Mem0 build through try_build_persistent; d0b main derives corpus_hash from the loaded gold and adds --mem0-persist / --no-mem0-persist (default ON for --mode full, OFF for cheap/pilot).
persist_key_scheme: persist=True -> chroma path /tmp/mem0_chroma_<corpus_hash12>, collection r2_eval_<corpus_hash12>, user_id r2-<corpus_hash12>, resume sidecar <chroma_path>.ingested.json (atomic temp+os.replace, sorted doc_id list). corpus_hash12 = corpus_hash[:12]. Deterministic/reproducible-by-construction (pure function of the corpus content hash). persist=False keeps the prior key: <corpus_hash12>_<run_id> (or <run_id> alone) with a fresh per-run run_id and user_id run_user_id(run_id).
ingest_resume_proof: Tiny live smoke (~1s, $0, real mem0.Memory + real on-disk chroma via try_build_persistent; LLM key set to a non-empty dummy so the OpenAI client constructs). corpus_hash12=deadbeefcafe -> chroma_path=/tmp/mem0_chroma_deadbeefcafe, user_id=r2-deadbeefcafe. Build 1 (real adapter, persist=True) ingest {d1,d2,d3} -> real memory.add() attempted for exactly ['d1','d2','d3']; sidecar -> ['d1','d2','d3']. Build 2 = a SEPARATE try_build_persistent adapter for the SAME corpus_hash -> ingest {d1,d2,d3,d4} -> real memory.add() attempted for ONLY ['d4'] (d1-d3 skipped via the on-disk sidecar); sidecar -> ['d1','d2','d3','d4']. Asserts passed (RC=0). The airlock LLM extraction returned a transient 400 'No connected db' (the proxy backend, orchestrator's concern for the full run) so chroma stayed unpopulated -> a populated retrieve() needs the orchestrator's live airlock; the reuse/resume DECISION (2nd build added only the new doc) is proven with real add-call counts here and by the backend-free unit test test_sidecar_ingest_adds_only_new_docs (real recorded .add() on a fake memory).
exact_run_command_for_orchestrator: cd /home/coreyt/projects/fathomdb && PYTHONPATH=$PWD/src/python:/tmp/d0b-mem0-env FATHOMDB_TESTS_NO_REBUILD=1 R2_RUN=1 R2_MEM0_API_KEY=<airlock-key> R2_MEM0_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000/v1 R2_MEM0_MODEL=qwen3.6-27b R2_ANSWERER_API_KEY=<airlock-key> R2_ANSWERER_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000/v1 R2_ANSWERER_MODEL=<strong-reader> /home/coreyt/projects/fathomdb/.venv/bin/python -m eval.d0b_parity_run --mode full --gold dev/plans/runs/0.8.3-d0a-memory-gold.json --output dev/plans/runs/0.8.3-d0b-full-parity.json --checkpoint dev/plans/runs/0.8.3-d0b-full.checkpoint.json --checkpoint-every 10 --max-usd <cap> --blockers-out dev/plans/runs/0.8.3-d0b-full-blockers.json   # --mem0-persist defaults ON for --mode full; the ~78-min corpus-keyed Mem0 ingest (corpus_hash=1859817a32bc) happens ONCE into /tmp/mem0_chroma_1859817a32bc and is reused/continued on any relaunch. A kill mid-ingest resumes from the <chroma_path>.ingested.json sidecar (zero re-ingest of completed docs). Use --no-mem0-persist only to force per-run isolation.

gate_results.agent_typecheck: exit 0, no errors on mem0_local.py / r2_parity_eval.py / d0b_parity_run.py (only pre-existing reportMissingModuleSource warnings on m1_ppr.py networkx, unrelated)
gate_results.ruff: All checks passed! (mem0_local.py, r2_parity_eval.py, d0b_parity_run.py, test_mem0_persist.py)
gate_results.canonical_repo_status: free of agent edits (only pre-existing untracked orchestrator files: 0.8.x-PROGRAM-STEWARD-HANDOFF.md, slice-10-phaseA-review log)

agent_verify_result: GREEN. RED commit a0e62247 failed 6/7 (TypeError: unexpected kwarg chroma_path + config assertions) BEFORE the change; GREEN commit 21123933 -> 7/7 test_mem0_persist + 37/37 over the mem0/persist/d0b/parity selection. DoD held: persistence is OPT-IN (persist=False byte-unchanged, codex Slice-5 [P1#2] per-run isolation + reproducibility preserved); persistent mode keyed by corpus_hash is deterministic (documented in the docstring); no engine/Rust, no installs, no priced calls, no full-corpus ingest; decision_rule_083.py + the gold artifact untouched. Only the credentialed live airlock add + populated retrieve are deferred to the orchestrator's full run.
